name: 12C — AI Overview Optimizer (ChatGPT / Perplexity / Google AI)

nodes.name: ⏰ Weekly AI Citation Audit
nodes.notes: Weekly audit of all published content. Rewrites underperforming sections to maximize AI citation probability. Also triggered by WF09A after new posts.

nodes.name: 🔔 Webhook — Optimize Post for AI Citations
nodes.notes: Called with specific post_id to optimize. Called by WF09A after new post creation.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Score Posts for AI Citation Potential
nodes.notes: Scores each post on 6 AI citation signals: clear definition, structured lists, FAQ section, sentence length, specific numbers, schema markup. Posts scoring under 60/100 get optimized.

values.content: You are an expert in AI search optimization — specifically in how ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Claude select content to cite in their responses. You rewrite blog content to maximize the probability of being cited by AI systems. Key principles: (1) AI systems prefer content that makes clear, declarative factual statements, (2) they love definitions, numbered lists, and FAQ-style Q&A, (3) they cite content that directly answers a question in the first sentence, (4) they prefer authoritative active voice over passive, (5) standalone sentences that are complete thoughts get cited most. Respond in valid JSON only.

=Optimize this blog post for AI citation (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overview): Post Title: {{$json.post_title}} Current AI Citation Score: {{$json.ai_citation_score}}/100 (Grade: {{$json.grade}}) Issues to fix: {{$json.issues.join('\n')}} Current strengths (preserve these): {{$json.strengths.join('\n')}} IMPORTANT CONSTRAINTS: - Do NOT rewrite the entire post — only add/improve specific sections - Keep all existing headings and main content - Only ADD or IMPROVE these specific elements: 1. Opening definition paragraph (if missing/weak) 2. A "Quick Answer" box at the very top (AI systems LOVE these) 3. FAQ section (if missing or needs expansion) 4. Convert any vague claims to specific numbered facts 5. Add a "Key Takeaways" bulleted summary near top The "Quick Answer" box format:
Quick Answer: [1-2 sentence direct answer to the implied question in the title]
Respond ONLY with this JSON: { "quick_answer_html": "
...
", "improved_opening_paragraph": "New first paragraph with clear definition — 50-70 words", "key_takeaways_html": "
  • ...
— 4-5 specific takeaways", "new_faq_section_html": "

Frequently Asked Questions

+ Q&A HTML — 4 questions", "faq_schema_entries": [ { "question": "Q?", "answer": "40-60 word standalone answer" } ], "insertion_instructions": { "quick_answer": "Insert after H1 title, before first paragraph", "key_takeaways": "Insert after quick answer box", "faq_section": "Replace existing FAQ or append before final CTA" }, "estimated_new_score": 85, "optimization_summary": "Brief description of changes made" }

nodes.name: 🧠 mistral — Optimize for AI Citations
nodes.notes: Low temp (0.4) for precise, factual optimization. mistral generates specific additions: quick answer box, opening definition, key takeaways, expanded FAQ. Doesn't rewrite existing content — only adds high-value citation-friendly elements.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Apply AI Optimizations to Content
nodes.notes: Applies all optimizations to existing content without destroying it. Inserts Quick Answer box, Key Takeaways, expanded FAQ, updated schema. Surgical additions only.

main.node: ⚙️ Score Posts for AI Citation Potential

meta.description: WF12C: AI Overview Optimizer. Scores all posts on 6 AI citation signals. Posts under 60/100 get surgical additions: Quick Answer box (highest citation trigger), Key Takeaways, expanded FAQ with 40-60 word standalone answers, updated FAQPage schema. Weekly audit + instant trigger from WF09A. Target: every post scores 70+ for ChatGPT/Perplexity/Google AI citation.
